table.no_data_sub: Try changing filters or add a new user

actions.bulk_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to bulk delete {{count}} users?
actions.edit_unavailable: Edit screen will be implemented in the next step

dialog.delete_confirm: The account of {{name}} will be permanently deleted.
dialog.delete_warning: ⚠ All orders, reviews, favorites, and notifications of this user will also be deleted.
dialog.role_confirm: Are you sure you want to grant Admin role to {{name}}? This account will have full administrative rights.
dialog.block_confirm: The account of {{name}} will be blocked and unable to sign in.
dialog.block_warning: ⚠ The user will be blocked from Web client and Admin until unblocked.

toast.network_error: Network connection error, please try again later.
toast.action_forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
toast.self_action_error: You cannot perform this action on your own account.
toast.feature_not_ready: User detail/edit screens are not implemented yet.

detail.no_bookings_desc: This user has not placed any booking orders yet.
detail.bookings_load_error_desc: Booking data is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
detail.no_ratings_desc: This user has not written any review comments yet.
detail.ratings_load_error_desc: Review data is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
detail.delete_desc: The account of {{name}} will be permanently deleted from the system.
detail.delete_warning_desc: All booking orders, payment transactions, written reviews, comments, and favorite listings associated with this user account will be permanently deleted.
detail.role_user_desc: Regular tourist account, allowed to view locations, book tours, and write reviews.
detail.role_admin_desc: Highest authority. Able to manage the entire system, add/edit/delete locations, manage user accounts, and view reports.
detail.role_dialog_subtitle: Select account role for the user
detail.role_elevate_warning: Caution: Elevating a user to Admin grants them full privileges to modify system records. Exercise utmost care before confirming.
detail.toast_delete_success: Account permanently deleted from the system.
detail.not_found_desc: This user account does not exist or has been deleted.

create.title: Create New User
create.subtitle: Add a new user account to the system
create.helper_username: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores
create.helper_password: Minimum 8 characters, including letters and numbers
create.helper_card_item1: Username must be unique in the system
create.helper_card_item2: Password must be at least 8 characters long
create.helper_card_item3: Email is used for login and notifications
create.helper_card_item4: Consider carefully before granting Admin role

edit.title: Edit User
edit.subtitle: Update user account information
edit.password_warning: To change the password, please request the user to use 'Forgot Password' or contact a senior administrator.
edit.email_warning: Changing the email address will require the user to verify the account again.
edit.unsaved_changes_desc: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

validation.username_format: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.password_complexity: Password must be at least 8 characters and include both letters and numbers.
